query:
-- Distribuição por setor (para filtro de setor)
SELECT setor, COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isOutlier=0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as limpos,
  CASE WHEN setor IS NULL OR setor='' THEN 'SEM SETOR' ELSE 'COM SETOR' END as tem_setor
FROM spread_analysis
GROUP BY setor
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3TCbxwuMo8bqgEH.3d9f28c4dd9f --database ibSgD3x7K24f8UHUmWHZV3 --execute 
-- Distribuição por setor (para filtro de setor)
SELECT setor, COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isOutlier=0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as limpos,
  CASE WHEN setor IS NULL OR setor='' THEN 'SEM SETOR' ELSE 'COM SETOR' END as tem_setor
FROM spread_analysis
GROUP BY setor
ORDER BY total DESC
LIMIT 20;
